headline: Suppliers to AI companies are big winners of spending surge
summary: Many of the most successful players in the AI arena, such as CoreWeave, Nvidia and AMD, are making the chips and memory modules that make the technology possible.

headline: Simply Contact Launches AI Call Simulation Onboarding Program for Multilingual Contact Center Agents
